untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'pivot range high' and 'pivot range low' which are not standard available indicators. The source material references daily pivot calculations that are not in the allowed indicator list (only standard pivot, r1, s1, r2, s2 are available). The confirmation condition 'price finds support at daily pivot low without trading below it' requires intraday support detection logic that cannot be expressed with the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to map to nearest pivot-based indicators (r1, s1, pivot) but the signal's core logic depends on custom pivot range calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. The bullish confirmation condition is particularly problematic as it requires monitoring intraday price action against a support level, which is not achievable with end-of-bar indicators and standard operators.
